transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Did you understand yesterday's calculus lecture?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Most of it, but I'm going to attend the review session tomorrow.

transcript.question_intro: What will the woman probably do?

questions.prompt: What will the woman probably do?

choices.text: Study calculus with the man tonight.
Ask the professor to repeat the lecture.

questions.explanation: She says she is going to attend the review session tomorrow.
questions.evidence: I'm going to attend the review session tomorrow.
